title: Windows Update Repair
description: Diagnose and repair Windows Update failures with staged safety gates.
starter_prompt: Diagnose and repair Windows Update. Start with read-only checks and verify with an update scan.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output '== Update services =='; Get-Service wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc,trustedinstaller | Format-Table Name,Status,StartType -AutoSize; Write-Output '== Pending reboot markers =='; $paths='HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired','HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager'; foreach ($p in $paths) { Write-Output $p; Test-Path $p }; Write-Output '== Update history =='; Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 HotFixID,Description,InstalledOn | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '== Windows Update events =='; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; ProviderName='Microsoft-Windows-WindowsUpdateClient'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30)} -MaxEvents 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List; Write-Output '== DISM CheckHealth =='; DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /CheckHealth; Write-Output '== Proxy =='; netsh winhttp show proxy

phases.prompt: Collect read-only Windows Update services, pending reboot state, update history, event logs, DISM CheckHealth, and proxy clues.
Analyze collected Windows Update services, pending reboot state, update history, WindowsUpdateClient events, CBS/DISM signals, network/proxy clues, and exact error code.
Propose staged repair from least-risk to higher-risk. Do not reset components or run DISM repair without overseer lease.
phases.completion: Repair plan has steps, risk, rollback, and verification.

phases.prompt: Ask human or apply access-mode policy before system-changing repair. Offer restore point when needed.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output '== Windows Update services before repair =='; Get-Service wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc,trustedinstaller | Format-Table Name,Status,StartType -AutoSize; Write-Output '== DISM ScanHealth =='; DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /ScanHealth; Write-Output '== DISM RestoreHealth =='; DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /RestoreHealth; Write-Output '== SFC scan =='; sfc /scannow; Write-Output '== Ensure update services running =='; Start-Service bits,wuauserv,cryptsvc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Service wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc,trustedinstaller | Format-Table Name,Status,StartType -AutoSize; Write-Output 'Repair commands finished. Reboot may be required before update scan verification.'

phases.prompt: Execute only approved Windows Update repair steps and capture full output.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output '== Update services after repair =='; Get-Service wuauserv,bits,cryptsvc,trustedinstaller | Format-Table Name,Status,StartType -AutoSize; Write-Output '== DISM CheckHealth after repair =='; DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /CheckHealth; Write-Output '== Pending reboot markers =='; $paths='HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Component Based Servicing\RebootPending','HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\WindowsUpdate\Auto Update\RebootRequired','HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager'; foreach ($p in $paths) { Write-Output $p; Test-Path $p }; Write-Output '== Recent Windows Update events =='; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; ProviderName='Microsoft-Windows-WindowsUpdateClient'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-2)} -MaxEvents 60 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List; Write-Output '== Recent hotfixes =='; Get-HotFix | Sort-Object InstalledOn -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 HotFixID,Description,InstalledOn | Format-Table -AutoSize

phases.prompt: Verify component health, update service state, pending reboot state, and recent update events after approved repair.
phases.completion: Original symptom is verified or remaining error is captured.

phases.prompt: Check whether repair matched evidence and whether verification is sufficient.
phases.completion: Review passes or gaps are listed.

phases.prompt: Create a technician-readable Windows Update repair report with evidence, repair actions/tools used, command output, verification result, logs/artifacts, cleanup status, residual risk, reboot needs, and follow-up.
Preserve CBS/DISM/update logs, command output, and reports; remove only temporary scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: Read-only evidence was collected before repair.
Restore-point prompt occurred before risky repair.
Final answer includes verification result and remaining risk.
